title: Re-ground after Feature 2.1.A
description:
## Objective
Capture what was built, update living docs, and orient for the next step.

## Implementation
1. Append an entry to `.devmeta/project-history.md` (create the file if it does not exist) summarising Feature 2.1.A: what shipped, file footprint, any unexpected findings.
2. Update `.devmeta/increments/increment-2-wpr/iterations/iteration-2.1/status.md` — set Feature 2.1.A status to Done.
3. If anything surprising or worth-remembering surfaced (gotcha, pattern), append an entry to `.devmeta/lessons-learned.md`.
4. Append a worker section to `.devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-stage-probability/context-log.md` summarising what you encountered.
5. Run `tk list --parent 1x7` to see where you are in the iteration.

## Tests
n/a — documentation update.
acceptance_criteria: project-history.md and iteration status.md updated; context-log appended
